items.phrase: We came up with this idea
items.example: We came up with this idea to create a channel about science.
It would be really cool to interview famous scientists.
So, what's the angle for our channel?
So the target audience is teenagers interested in technology.

items.phrase: The videos will be presented by…
items.example: The videos will be presented by young creators from around the UK.
We are looking for funding to make exciting videos about the environment.
We intend to predict the effects of climate change.
We will upload new videos once a month.
